channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: UK’s Starmer resigns, paving way for orderly transfer of power
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Keir Starmer announces resignation as UK prime minister and Labour Party leader
- Why has Keir Starmer resigned as UK prime minister?
- UK PM Keir Starmer quits
- Keir Starmer Resigns as UK Prime Minister
- Watch: U.K. PM Keir Starmer resigns: What went wrong?
- Keir Starmer has quit as prime minister – what will happen next in UK politics?

- Keir Starmer’s rise to power and resignation as UK prime minister
- UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer Officially Calls It Quits

- Why has Keir Starmer resigned as UK prime minister, and who will take over?
- Kier Starmer resigns as United Kingdom prime minister
- Starmer to resign as UK prime minister
- Keir Starmer resigns
- U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer Quits Amid Rebellion
- Keir Starmer resigns as British prime minister
- UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer announces resignation
- UK PM Starmer announces resignation amid mounting pressure, says will give successor 'full, unequivocal support'
- UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer announces resignation plan
- UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer says he will resign
- LIVE: UK’s Starmer resigns as prime minister
- Starmer announces resignation, making way for UK’s seventh prime minister in a decade
- Keir Starmer 13th U.K. PM to resign, sixth after Brexit
- Keir Starmer announces his resignation as U.K. Prime Minister as Andy Burnham arrives in London

- British PM Starmer announces resignation
- Keir Starmer steps down as UK prime minister

- Keir Starmer to step down as prime minister two years after historic election victory
- Keir Starmer announces resignation as UK Prime Minister

- British PM Starmer announces resignation: What happens next?

- Replay: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer steps down

- Keir Starmer steps down as Labour Party leader, says will remain UK PM until successor chosen
- Keir Starmer resigns: The problems that piled up for the UK prime minister
- 'Heard the answer': Keir Starmer announces resignation as UK PM in tearful goodbye
- Keir Starmer, who ended 14-year Conservative rule in UK, resigns as PM: All about him
- Keir Starmer resignation LIVE: Andy Burnham to contest for UK PM post as Keir Starmer announces resignation

- Keir Starmer resigns as UK PM amid Labour Party turmoil
- Keir Starmer resigns as UK prime minister
- British PM Starmer reportedly set to quit as Labour rival sworn in as MP

- UK’s Starmer resigns as prime minister
- UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer Announces Resignation as Labour Party Leader

- UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer resigns

- Alan Greenspan dies aged 100

- 13 dead, 66 injured: consequences of explosion at plant in Qatar
